mapper.select: SELECT w.name AS websiteName, -- 只查询需要的字段 w.url AS websiteUrl, w.description AS websiteDescription, f.create_time AS favoriteTime, f.remark AS remark FROM osh_user_favorite_website f LEFT JOIN osh_practical_website w ON f.website_id = w.id AND w.delete_flag = 0 WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
